title: Good in This World and the Next
summary: A comprehensive Quranic supplication asking Allah for good in this life, good in the Hereafter, and protection from the Fire.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَآ ءَاتِنَا فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةًۭ وَفِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ حَسَنَةًۭ وَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana atina fi al-dunya hasanatan wa fi al-akhirati hasanatan wa qina adhaba al-nar.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
